linting.notes: Frontend uses ESLint with TypeScript parser, max-warnings set to 0 (strict). Prettier enforces formatting. BFF uses golangci-lint v1.63.4 with default config.

testing.test_directory: frontend/src/__tests__ (Jest unit tests in unit/, Cypress E2E in cypress/), bff/*_test.go files
testing.run_command: cd frontend && npm run test:jest (for unit tests); cd bff && make test (for Go tests)
testing.run_single_file: cd frontend && npx jest {file}; cd bff && go test {package}
testing.run_single_test: cd frontend && npx jest -t '{test_name}'; cd bff && go test -run '{TestName}' {package}
env_vars: ENVTEST_ASSETS (optional, for bff tests with envtest)
testing.mock_patterns: Jest mocks via moduleNameMapper in jest.config.js
testing.notes: Frontend has 77 Jest unit tests passing. BFF has 3 test files with tests in cmd/ and internal/api/ packages. Full frontend test suite includes Cypress E2E tests (npm run test). ENVTEST downloads may fail with 401 errors but tests run successfully with empty ENVTEST_ASSETS.

ci.notes: Both workflows trigger on pull_request and push to main. They check for uncommitted file changes after build. Frontend uses Node 20, BFF uses Go 1.24.3 (note: go.mod specifies 1.23.5, CI uses 1.24.3). Frontend 'npm run test' includes lint, type-check, jest, and cypress tests.

build.install_command: cd frontend && npm install; cd bff && go mod download
build.build_command: cd frontend && npm run build; cd bff && make build
build.notes: Frontend build requires prebuild step (type-check and clean). BFF build runs fmt, vet, and test before compiling. Frontend build outputs to frontend/dist/. BFF build outputs to bff/bin/bff.

conventions.test_naming: frontend: describe/it blocks (Jest); bff: TestXxx functions
conventions.import_style: frontend: path aliases with ~ prefix for root, @app/* for app code; bff: standard Go imports
conventions.notes: Frontend enforces strict ESLint rules including no-console, max-warnings 0. Prettier formats to 100 char width, single quotes, trailing commas. BFF follows standard Go conventions.

Passed with exit code 0, no type errors

test_commands.notes: Passed: 6 test suites, 77 tests passed in 1.965s
Passed: 2 test packages (cmd, internal/api), envtest download warning but tests run successfully

container_recipe.test_single_file: cd /app/frontend && npx jest {file}; cd /app/bff && go test {package_path}
container_recipe.test_single_test: cd /app/frontend && npx jest -t '{test_name}'; cd /app/bff && go test -run '{TestName}' {package_path}
container_recipe.notes: ENVTEST download fails with 401 Unauthorized from GCS but tests run with empty ENVTEST_ASSETS. Frontend Cypress tests require a running dev server and are skipped in unit test runs.
